module.dgmodules.dragon_guard.desc: Prevents a lethal blow by consuming a massive amount of energy.
tooltip.dgmodules.hp_damage.desc: Deals extra damage based on the target's current health
tooltip.dgmodules.hp_cut.total: Life Reduction Total: %s%% (based on target current health)
module.dgmodules.energy_saver.desc: Reduces the OP cost of the entire host. Multiple modules stack additively before being applied to all host energy usage.
tooltip.dgmodules.energy_saver.rate: This module reduces host OP usage by %s%%
tooltip.dgmodules.energy_saver.stack: Applies to armor, tools, melee weapons, and bows installed as valid hosts.
module.dgmodules.flight_tuner.desc: Adjusts flight speed, removes inertia, and can force flight mode.
module.dgmodules.negative_effect_immunit: Immune to all harmful potion effects
module.dgmodules.compressed_chaotic_ener: Compresses 3 chaotic energy modules into a 2×1 module, providing higher energy capacity and transfer.
module.dgmodules.compressed_chaotic_shie: Compresses 3 chaotic shield recovery modules into a 2×1 module, greatly increasing shield recharge.
item.dgmodules.compressed_chaotic_large_: Compressed Chaotic Large Shield Capacity Module
module.dgmodules.compressed_chaotic_larg: Compresses 3 chaotic large shield capacity modules into a 2×2 module, greatly increasing shield capacity.
module.dgmodules.compressed_chaotic_dama: Compresses 3 chaotic damage modules into a 2×1 module, significantly increasing damage.
module.dgmodules.compressed_chaotic_spee: Compresses 3 chaotic speed modules into a 2×1 module, significantly increasing speed.
• Enhance the overall performance of the shield
module.dgmodules.phase_shield.desc: Press the key to enter phase state: cancel all attacks and ignore all damage, draining massive OP.
tooltip.dgmodules.phase_shield.require: Requires: Shield Control Booster module installed in the chestpiece.
tooltip.dgmodules.phase_shield.cost: Drain: massive OP per tick (auto disables when out of power).
hud.dgmodules.phase_shield.on: Phase Shield enabled - it won't last long, get out of danger!
module.dgmodules.dimension_anchor.desc: Anchors nearby combat targets, preventing teleports, blinks, and escape from the battle zone.
tooltip.dgmodules.dimension_anchor.radiu: Boundary radius adjustable in the host GUI (1~128 blocks).
tooltip.dgmodules.dimension_anchor.key: Default key: N (configurable), toggle on/off on press.
tooltip.dgmodules.dimension_anchor.cost: Consumes massive OP while anchoring hostile targets.
tooltip.dgmodules.dimension_anchor.effec: Suppresses flight and returns marked enemies to their last valid position.
module.dgmodules.cataclysm_arrow.desc: Arrows trigger a violent cataclysm on impact, dealing devastating explosion damage.
tooltip.dgmodules.cataclysm_arrow.cost: Consumes 650,000 OP per launched arrow. Toggle in host config GUI.
death.attack.cataclysm_arrow: %1$s was obliterated by cataclysmic arrow force
death.attack.cataclysm_pierce: %1$s was shredded by high-frequency cataclysm pulses
module.dgmodules.frame_breaker.desc: Clears target i-frames so high-frequency hits can apply every time.
module.dgmodules.blast_space.desc: Reach distance and attack range +%s blocks
module.dgmodules.satiety.desc: Applies a permanent Saturation effect, keeping food level and saturation fully maxed.
tooltip.dgmodules.shield_dome.line1: Deploys a 2000-point protective shield dome for 75s
tooltip.dgmodules.shield_dome.line2: Absorbs incoming damage for nearby players
tooltip.dgmodules.shield_dome.line3: Repels hostile mobs and intercepts projectiles
